summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Advanced Analytics module. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Advanced Analytics tab fully functional with period selector, sub-tabs, KPI cards, charts, and export buttons working correctly. Fixed timezone comparison bug in custom period handling.

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on interactive elements (buttons, tabs, inputs) for automated testing

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/crm/analytics/advanced - Default 6m period returns all analytics data (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/analytics/advanced - 12m period works correctly (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/analytics/advanced - Custom period with dates works (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/analytics/advanced - Returns retention_cohorts structure (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/analytics/advanced - Returns ltv_by_segment, ltv_trend, top_clients_by_ltv (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/analytics/advanced - Returns attrition_risks with AI analysis (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/analytics/advanced - Returns summary_kpis (200)
Backend: POST /api/crm/analytics/advanced - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/crm/analytics/attrition - Returns risk analysis with risk_summary (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/analytics/attrition - Limit parameter works (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/analytics/attrition - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/crm/analytics/retention-cohorts - Returns cohort data (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/analytics/retention-cohorts - 12m period works (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/analytics/retention-cohorts - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/crm/analytics/ltv - Returns LTV by segment, top clients, trend (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/analytics/ltv - 6m period works (200)
Backend: GET /api/crm/analytics/ltv - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: AI analysis generated for high/critical risk clients (200)
Backend: KPI consistency between endpoints verified
Backend: Risk score bounds (0-100) and level mapping verified
Frontend: Analytique Avancée tab visible and clickable
Frontend: Period selector (6 derniers mois, 12 derniers mois, Personnalisé) works
Frontend: Custom period shows date inputs when selected
Frontend: KPI cards display (Clients totaux, Clients actifs, Clients à risque, LTV moyen, CA total, Taux rétention)
Frontend: Sub-tabs work (Vue d'ensemble, Rétention, Valeur Client (LTV), Prédictions Attrition)
Frontend: Retention cohorts chart displays with 30/90/180 days legend
Frontend: LTV by segment chart and trend chart display
Frontend: Attrition risks section shows risk level badges (Critique, Élevé, Moyen)
Frontend: Export Excel button downloads CSV file (crm_analytics_YYYY-MM-DD.csv)
Frontend: Export PDF button triggers print dialog
action_items: Add data-testid attributes to AdvancedAnalytics.tsx for better automated testing coverage
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Timezone comparison bug in calculate_period_dates() - custom dates without timezone info now properly converted to UTC
seed_data_creation: Used existing CRM clients for testing. No new test data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced Analytics module fully tested. All 4 backend endpoints work: POST /api/crm/analytics/advanced, GET /api/crm/analytics/attrition, GET /api/crm/analytics/retention-cohorts, GET /api/crm/analytics/ltv. Frontend AdvancedAnalytics.tsx component renders correctly with all sub-tabs, period selector, charts, and export buttons. AI analysis uses GPT-4o via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for high/critical risk clients. Export Excel generates CSV, Export PDF triggers browser print.

advanced_analytics_api.main_endpoint: POST /api/crm/analytics/advanced - returns retention_cohorts, ltv_by_segment, ltv_trend, top_clients_by_ltv, attrition_risks, summary_kpis
advanced_analytics_api.attrition_endpoint: GET /api/crm/analytics/attrition - returns risk_summary and clients with risk_score, risk_level, risk_factors, ai_analysis, recommended_actions

frontend_advanced_analytics.tab: Analytique Avancée tab visible in CRM navigation
frontend_advanced_analytics.period_selector: 6 derniers mois, 12 derniers mois, Personnalisé with date inputs
frontend_advanced_analytics.attrition_display: Risk level badges (Critique, Élevé, Moyen) with AI analysis and recommendations

ai_integration.usage: Generates ai_analysis and recommended_actions for clients with risk_score >= 50 (high/critical)

bug_fixed.issue: Custom period dates caused TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
bug_fixed.fix: Added timezone handling in calculate_period_dates() to ensure all dates have UTC timezone info
